dataset.name: Customer Support FAQ
dataset.description: Sample support prompts for the MVP demo.

test_cases.input_text: How can I reset my password?
test_cases.expected_output: Explain the password reset flow clearly and briefly.

test_cases.input_text: What is your refund policy for annual plans?
test_cases.expected_output: Describe refund rules and mention support contact if needed.

test_cases.input_text: My order has not arrived yet. What should I do?
test_cases.expected_output: Ask for order details, shipping window, and next steps.

prompt_version.name: Support Assistant
prompt_version.prompt_text: You are a concise and helpful support assistant. Answer using clear and friendly language.
